name: md2docx-pdf
description: Convert .md files to .docx and/or .pdf. Cross-platform. Auto-detects pandoc and Chrome/Edge, prints install commands if missing.

steps.note: If winget/brew/apt not available, direct user to https://pandoc.org/installing.html

steps.desc: Check browser for PDF (optional, skip if only need DOCX)
steps.check: which google-chrome || which chromium-browser || which microsoft-edge || ls '/c/Program Files/Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe' || ls '/Applications/Google Chrome.app'
steps.note: If none found and PDF is needed, suggest installing Chrome or setting BROWSER_PATH

arguments.inputs: .md file paths or glob patterns like *.md
arguments.-o: output directory  (default: same dir as input)

pipeline.pdf: .md -> pandoc -> html5 -> inject CJK CSS -> headless browser -> .pdf
